feed.title: Global Chinese
feed.subtitle: Latest articles from Global Chinese (De Gruyter)

entry.title: 优选论的发展及其在汉语音系学研究中的应用
entry.summary: Authors: 张杰 Jie Zhang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/glochi-2026-0002 Pages: Page range: 1-33

entry.title: “你说 ‘大牌’，我猜你是新加坡人?” —— 大语言模型识别与生成汉语变体的能力评估
entry.summary: Authors: Qiao Fang, Jingxia Lin DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/glochi-2025-0017 Pages: Page range: 35-61

entry.title: Exploring translator adaptation and selection in the translation of Museum texts: a case study of the Luoyang Museum
entry.summary: Authors: Weijia Liu, Yuan Zhou, Elmira Kylychbaeva, Nazira Shakeeva, Zhaoxi Li DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/glochi-2025-0023 Pages: Page range: 63-88

entry.title: Literacy and rurality in China: a scoping review
entry.summary: Authors: Jing Wu, Ibrar Bhatt, Zhe Li DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/glochi-2025-0027 Pages: Page range: 89-109

entry.title: The acquisition of Chineseshì…deproper clefts by L1 Italian learners: a corpus-based approach
